reasoning: The resolution depends on whether the Project 2025 objective to 'terminate the Public Service Loan Forgiveness program' was marked as complete on the Keep_Track spreadsheet before July 1, 2025. Multiple sources published in late 2025 and early 2026 detail that while the SAVE plan was eliminated, the PSLF program actively continued. For example, a September 2025 CNBC article reports on a PSLF buyback backlog under the Trump administration, and a February 2026 guide confirms that student loans were forgiven throughout 2025 under the same PSLF structures acting today. Because PSLF is established by statute, terminating it would require an act of Congress, which did not occur. Consequently, there is no factual basis for the tracker to have marked the termination of PSLF as complete before July 1, 2025.
